title: FED-1.1 — Migration: organisations + users
description: organisations (single seed row) + users auth collection with role, org, is_active, invite fields.
close_reason: organisations collection (single seed row 'Federfall', id org00000default) + users auth collection extended with role/org/is_active/invited_by/phone. Migration 1700000001 verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4 instance.

title: Phase 0 — Foundations & toolchain
description: Repo, scaffold, deps, local PocketBase, CI. See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §Phase 0.

title: FED-0.5 — Local PocketBase dev setup
description: Containerized PocketBase dev setup (no host binary): backend/pocketbase/ with pinned-version Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml (pb_data volume, port mapping), pb_migrations/ + pb_hooks/ mounted, .env.example, run script (docker compose up), Automigrate in dev, README. Goal: 'docker compose up' serves PocketBase locally.
close_reason: Containerized PocketBase v0.39.4 backend: Dockerfile + compose + README; build/health smoke-tested OK; no host binary, no .env

title: Phase 1 — Backend: schema, rules, hooks
description: All PocketBase collections as migrations, API access rules, JS hooks. The data contract. §Phase 1.
close_reason: All 13 children complete (FED-1.1–1.13). Backend schema (15 collections), API access rules (security boundary), JS hooks (case_number/quarantine/status/handoff/field-guard), German conditions seed, and a 41-assertion rule/hook test suite wired into CI. DoD met: schema reproducible from migrations on a clean instance; access rules proven by tests; sample data loads.

title: FED-1.11 — API access rules
description: Collection rules on every collection: private-by-default + case_shares + roles (carer / coordinator all-read / supervisor all) + org scope. The security boundary.
close_reason: API access rules on all 14 app collections + users authRule(is_active). Private-by-default + case_shares(read/edit) + role scope + org scope; finders PII gated by case visibility; animals/markings org-readable for re-ID. Edit-share correlation verified safe on PB 0.39.4. End-to-end tested across owner/read/edit/outsider/supervisor/coordinator + deactivated-auth + down-revert.

title: FED-0.2 — Scaffold Flutter app (very_good_cli)
description: Pub workspace + `very_good create flutter_app` with flavors dev/prod, very_good_analysis, l10n.
close_reason: very_good app scaffolded (android/ios/web), pub workspace wired, analyze clean, 8 tests pass

title: FED-1.2 — Migration: animals
description: Persistent animal identity: name, species, sex, is_owned, current_aviary, lifetime_status, org.
close_reason: animals collection: name(presentable), species, sex, is_owned, lifetime_status, tags(json), notes, org. current_aviary relation deferred to FED-1.8 (aviaries collection doesn't exist yet). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-1.3 — Migration: cases
description: Care episode: animal, case_number, age_class, intake fields, find_location+geo, reasons, quarantine_until, status, is_releasable, active_carer, optional exam fields, org.
close_reason: finders (PII, all-optional contact fields) + cases (care episode: animal/case_number[unique idx]/age_class/intake+find_geo geoPoint/reasons multi-select/quarantine/status/is_releasable/active_carer/optional exam_* fields/org). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-0.1 — Repo init & structure
description: git init, pub-workspace repo layout (apps/, packages/, backend/, docs/), .gitignore (pb_data, build, .env), licence.
close_reason: Repo structure, .gitignore, AGPL-3.0 license, README, docs/ established; backend set to fully containerized

title: FED-3.0 — Server configuration (instance URL, first-run)
description: NATIVE (Android/iOS) ONLY, Nextcloud-style first-run flow: before login the user enters their Federfall server URL. Validate (normalize scheme/host, probe GET /api/health, clear errors for unreachable/invalid/non-Federfall), persist (shared_preferences), feed PB client base URL (FED-2.1). Re-configurable later via 'switch server'. ON WEB this screen is SKIPPED entirely: base URL = the app's own serving origin (Uri.base.origin) since backend+frontend share the domain. Includes setup screen UI, validation logic, persisted-URL provider, and platform branch.
acceptance_criteria: On native first launch with no stored URL: server-config screen shown; valid reachable URL accepted/persisted/routed to login; invalid/unreachable shows inline error and blocks; after restart stored URL reused (setup skipped); 'switch server' clears it back to setup. On web: setup screen never shown; base URL resolves to the serving origin.
close_reason: Implemented server-config validation (normalizeServerUrl + ServerProbe: probe /api/health, classify invalid/unreachable/not-Federfall) and the real first-run setup screen (form, inline errors, busy state, persist-on-success → gate routes to login). Phase 2 had already wired ServerConfig/storage/controller/router-gate/PB-provider. 'Switch server' UI entry point deferred to FED-3.1 login (clearServerUrl mechanism in place). 54 tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: FED-8.5 — Release builds (M4=MVP)
description: Android (Play internal), iOS (TestFlight), Web prod; German store metadata. MVP shipped.

title: FED-8.4 — Test pass (~80%) + golden + E2E
description: Domain/repo coverage to ~80% + golden tests + a few patrol E2E happy-paths.

title: FED-3.5 — Deploy walking skeleton (M1)
description: Containerized deploy on VPS: Docker Compose stack — Caddy (auto-TLS, reverse proxy, SPA rewrites for Flutter web) + PocketBase container (pinned image, pb_data volume) + Litestream sidecar for SQLite backups; CORS origins configured; Flutter web build served; one mobile debug build. Reproducible via 'docker compose up -d'; no host-level systemd/binary.

title: FED-3.4 — Minimal case slice
description: Minimal create-case (name+species+reason) → list of my cases → case detail stub.
close_reason: Minimal case slice: create-case (name+species+reason → creates animal then case with active_carer=self; hooks fill case_number/status/quarantine), my-cases list on home (forCarer, newest first, +FAB, logout), case detail stub (case number/animal/status/reasons). Added CasesRepository.forCarer. Code-list labels (AdmissionReason/CaseStatus) localized via arb. Tests: forCarer, home (empty/list/logout), new-case (create + reason-required). 64 app + data tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: FED-4.3 — Case detail overview
description: Case detail (name-first label, status, timeline).
close_reason: Case detail overview: name-first header (animal name → species · case number, status chip), intake summary card incl. linked finder, and a chronological timeline seeded from intake milestones for later Phase 4 slices to extend.

title: FED-4.1 — Full intake + animal link + finder
description: Full intake form (light + photos) + create/link animal; finder capture.
close_reason: Full intake form: animal (name/species/sex), intake (multi-select reasons, age class, found/admitted dates, find location, weight, notes) and optional finder capture. Photo upload deferred to FED-4.7 (needs file-upload infra); map-based find-location is FED-4.2.

title: FED-4.11 — Disposition (release/died/euth/transfer/return)
description: Release (location/geo) · died · euthanized · transferred · returned-to-owner.
close_reason: Disposition (release/died/euthanized/transferred/returned-to-owner) as a terminal timeline event. Disposition sheet with type selector revealing relevant fields: release (location via map picker + geo + release type + optional vet sign-off), transfer (destination + type), euthanasia (free-text performing vet — vets don't log in — instead of a sign-off toggle, per user). disposed_at defaults to today, selectable. Backend hook handles the side effects (case status=disposed, animal lifetime_status). 'Record outcome' in the timeline add-menu (hidden once disposed). placed_in_aviary excluded (FED-4.12, needs aviaries). Migration adds dispositions.vet. Also: intake found/admitted dates now default to today. Tests for death/release/euthanasia-vet + tile.

title: FED-1.12 — JS hooks
description: Auto case_number (per-year), default quarantine_until (+14d), maintain status/lifetime_status, share-on-handoff (previous carer keeps read).
notes: FED-1.11 left users.updateRule SUPERVISOR-ONLY. To enable self-service profile edit (FED-3.3), widen users.updateRule to allow self (@request.auth.id = id) BUT add an onRecordUpdateRequest hook that rejects any change to role/org/is_active by a non-supervisor (prevent privilege escalation). Until that guard exists, keep updateRule supervisor-only.
close_reason: pb_hooks/main.pb.js: (1) cases auto case_number per-year+org / quarantine_until +14d / status default; (2) dispositions maintain case.status + animal.lifetime_status/current_aviary; (3) share-on-handoff (prev carer keeps read); (4) users field-guard blocks role/org/is_active/verified escalation by non-supervisors. Migration 1700000011 widens users.updateRule to self+supervisor (safe behind guard). All 5 behaviors verified live on PB 0.39.4; learned PB hook callbacks run in isolated VMs so helpers must be inlined.

title: FED-2.5 — Theming + l10n + base widgets
description: Theme, German l10n scaffolding, base widgets (forms, buttons, async/error states).
close_reason: Material 3 theme (teal-green seed, light+dark, tuned components) + spacing tokens; German-default l10n with base strings (loading/error/actions/validation); base widgets (LoadingView, ErrorView, EmptyView, AsyncValueView, PrimaryButton, AppTextField) + localized Validators. 12 new tests; app uses AppTheme + de locale.

title: Phase 2 — Flutter foundation
description: Cross-cutting: PB client+auth store, models, repositories, routing, l10n, offline cache. §Phase 2.
close_reason: All 7 Phase 2 tasks complete: models+mappers, PB client+auth store, repository layer, routing gate, theming+l10n+widgets, offline read cache (generalized to all collections), error handling+logging.

title: FED-1.5 — Migration: markings
description: Rings/microchip/temp markers: animal, type, code, scheme_org, colour, applied/removed, applied_in_case. Drives re-identification.
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-1.9 — Migration: case_shares
description: case_shares (case, user, access read/edit) for opt-in sharing.
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-2.2 — Models + mappers
description: freezed models + RecordModel→model mappers for all collections (federfall_models).
close_reason: federfall_models package: 15 freezed models + RecordModel mappers, enums with wire values, PB date/geo/empty-string converters, 13 passing tests. Registered in workspace.

title: FED-1.4 — Migration: finders (PII)
description: Finder/rescuer external person: names, org, phones, email, full address, notes. GDPR-sensitive.
close_reason: finders (PII, all-optional contact fields) + cases (care episode: animal/case_number[unique idx]/age_class/intake+find_geo geoPoint/reasons multi-select/quarantine/status/is_releasable/active_carer/optional exam_* fields/org). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: Phase 3 — Walking skeleton (M1)
description: Auth + minimal case, deployed end-to-end. Milestone M1. §Phase 3.

title: FED-1.7 — Migration: clinical logs
description: weights, medications, journal_entries (+file fields), placements collections.
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: Phase 4 — Core case lifecycle (M2)
description: Intake → treatment → disposition, re-admission. Milestone M2. §Phase 4.

title: FED-1.6 — Migration: conditions + case_conditions
description: Conditions code list + case_conditions (certainty suspected/confirmed, onset/resolved dates).
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-2.4 — Routing
description: go_router: web usePathUrlStrategy, error/404 routes. Two-stage redirect gate: (1) native + no server configured -> /setup (FED-3.0); (2) unauthenticated -> /login; else app shell. On web the server is always configured (serving origin) so /setup never triggers.
close_reason: go_router with two-stage redirect gate (native-unconfigured→/setup, unauthenticated→/login, else home), splash while resolving, 404 errorBuilder, web path-URL strategy via conditional-import shim. AuthStatus provider exposes valid-session signal for the gate. Placeholder screens for FED-3.0/3.1/3.3. 4 gate tests.

title: FED-2.1 — PocketBase client + auth store
description: PB client provider + AsyncAuthStore over flutter_secure_storage (native) with web fallback. Base URL is PLATFORM-RESOLVED: web = app's own serving origin (Uri.base.origin); native = user-configured server URL (persisted, FED-3.0). Not hardcoded/env. Client rebuilds when URL changes (provider keyed on resolved URL); native unconfigured state exposed so routing can gate.
close_reason: PocketBase client provider built async over AsyncAuthStore; platform auth token storage (secure on native, prefs on web); ServerConfig resolution (web=origin, native=persisted/unconfigured) with setServerUrl/clearServerUrl; client keyed on config so switching servers rebuilds. 6 passing tests.

title: FED-1.8 — Migration: aviaries + dispositions
description: aviaries + dispositions (release vs placed_in_aviary vs died/euthanized/transferred/returned_to_owner).
notes: Also add the deferred current_aviary relation (animals → aviaries, nullable, maxSelect 1, cascadeDelete false) to the animals collection in this migration — it was deferred from FED-1.2 because aviaries didn't exist yet.
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-1.13 — Rule/hook tests
description: Scripted tests against throwaway pb instance: verify visibility & handoff behaviour.
close_reason: backend/pocketbase/tests/{run.sh,test_rules.py}: throwaway-instance suite, 41 assertions covering schema/seed, all FED-1.12 hooks (case_number/quarantine/status/dispositions/share-on-handoff/field-guard) and the FED-1.11 rule matrix (private-default, read/edit shares incl. no-escalation, coordinator all-read, supervisor all, finder-PII gating, handoff visibility, deactivated-auth, org isolation). Wired into CI as 'backend-rules' job. Exit codes verified (pass=0, fail!=0).

title: FED-2.3 — Repository layer
description: Repository interfaces + PocketBase implementations for all collections (auth, cases, animals, weights, meds, journal, conditions, placements, dispositions, markings, aviaries, shares, finders).
close_reason: federfall_data package: generic Repository<T> interface + PbRepository base (CRUD, bound-param filters, ClientException→RepositoryException), AuthRepository (signIn/refresh/signOut/currentUser/changes), and typed repos for all collections (cases w/ interface for cache decorator, animals, finders, aviaries, conditions+case_conditions, weights/meds/journal/placements, markings, dispositions, case_shares) with case-scoped query helpers. App-side keepAlive providers bind each repo to the async client. 13 data tests + analyze clean.

title: FED-0.4 — Core dependencies
description: Add pocketbase, flutter_riverpod, go_router(+builder), freezed/json_serializable/build_runner, flutter_secure_storage, flutter_map, l10n.
close_reason: Core deps added (riverpod/go_router/pocketbase/freezed/flutter_map/secure_storage/shared_preferences + codegen+riverpod_lint); bloc removed, counter demo replaced with Riverpod ProviderScope; analyze clean, tests pass, build_runner codegen verified end-to-end

title: FED-0.3 — App identity & flavors
description: Name Federfall, app id de.jhbruhn.federfall, icon/splash placeholders, --dart-define-from-file wiring for dev/prod.
close_reason: App identity + native flavors (from scaffold) confirmed; dart-define-from-file config layer added (dart_defines/*.json + AppEnvironment), verified values flow through; analyze clean, tests pass. Icon/splash deferred to owner (federfall-gyt).

title: FED-0.6 — CI skeleton
description: GitHub Actions: format → analyze → test+coverage (~80% gate on domain/repo). Branch protection.
close_reason: CI workflow (format→analyze→test+coverage 80% gate, Flutter 3.44.3 pinned) added and dry-run green locally end-to-end; added app_environment test (100% app coverage). Branch protection deferred until a remote exists.

title: FED-3.2 — Invite/approval flow
description: Supervisor invites → accept-invite sets password → role assigned. No open self-registration.
close_reason: Invite/approval flow (PocketBase-native, SMTP-assumed): app-level supervisor invites via AuthRepository.inviteUser (creates users record active+throwaway pw, then requestPasswordReset email); invitee follows the emailed link to /auth/confirm-reset (gate opened for no-session), sets password via confirmPasswordReset, then logs in. Admin screen now hosts the invite form (email/name/role, supervisor-gated). No custom collection/endpoint. Deploy config (SMTP + reset email template URL) tracked in federfall-353. Tests: repo inviteUser/confirmPasswordReset, admin invite + auth gate, confirm-reset success/mismatch/missing-token, router gate reachability. 74 app + 24 data tests pass.

title: FED-3.1 — Login & session
description: Email+password login against the CONFIGURED server (after FED-3.0 server selection), session restore on launch, logout. Logout returns to login but keeps the server URL; offer 'change/switch server' which clears it back to /setup.
close_reason: Login & session: email+password sign-in via AuthRepository against the configured server; reactive currentUser provider; home shell shows signed-in user + logout (signOut → gate → /login, server URL kept); native-only 'switch server' clears URL back to /setup. Session restore via persisted AsyncAuthStore token + AuthStatus. l10n (en+de) + widget tests. 60 tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: Weight UI: record from animal detail + life-long trend
description: With weights animal-scoped: record weight from the animal lifetime detail (no case); show a life-long weight trend on the animal detail; the case overview's weight trend filters to that case's weights (or window). When recording inside a case, stamp the case too.

title: Weight: animal-scoped (animal required, case optional) + backfill
description: Make weights animal-level so they can be recorded without a case and tracked across cases (residents). Migration: add required 'animal' relation to weights, make 'case' optional; backfill animal from case for existing rows; update access rules (animal-scoped: visible if you can read the animal/org; or follow case when present). Model: Weight gains animal + nullable caseId. Mirrors markings (animal + optional appliedInCase). Verify on live PB.

title: 'Open a new case for this animal' shortcut
description: A resident relapse currently needs the blank new-case form + ring re-id search. Add a 'new case' action on the animal lifetime detail (and aviary resident rows) that opens the new-case flow prefilled/linked to this animal.
acceptance_criteria: From an animal/resident the user can start a new case already linked to that animal; analyze clean + test.
close_reason: Animal detail has a 'New case' action -> /cases/new?animal=<id>; NewCaseScreen takes optional animalId and preloads it as the linked animal (skips re-id). Residents reach it via their animal detail. Widget test; analyze clean, 173 green.

title: Case <-> animal navigation link
description: Case detail has no link to the animal lifetime record. Add an animal link (tap the header/avatar or an action) from the case detail to /animals/:id, closing the navigation loop.
acceptance_criteria: From a case detail the user can open the animal lifetime record; analyze clean + test.
close_reason: Case detail now has an 'Open animal record' app-bar action -> /animals/:id, closing the case<->animal nav loop. Avatar stays photo-edit; separate affordance. analyze clean, 172 green.

title: Manage markings from the animal lifetime detail (no case needed)
description: Markings are already animal-level (animal + optional appliedInCase) but showMarkingSheet requires a caseId and the animal detail shows them read-only. Make caseId optional; add add/edit/remove marking actions on the animal lifetime detail (appliedInCase=null when outside a case); invalidate markingsForAnimal. Keep the case-timeline marking view.
acceptance_criteria: From the animal detail a user can add/edit/remove a marking with no case; markings still show in the case timeline; analyze clean + tests.
close_reason: Markings now manageable from the animal lifetime detail: showMarkingSheet caseId optional; animal detail markings section has apply (no case) + per-marking edit/mark-removed/delete; applied_in_case null when outside a case. Case timeline view unchanged. Widget test; analyze clean, 172 green.

title: Animal-centric records — manage data without a case
description: Make the animal the hub for data that belongs to it (markings, weight, photo) so it can be recorded WITHOUT an open case — essential now that aviary residents have no active case. Cases remain only for treatment episodes (conditions, meds, handoffs, disposition). See analysis 2026-06-24.

title: Case overview: list prior cases for the animal at the bottom
description: On the case detail Overview tab, append a 'Previous cases' section listing the animal's OTHER cases (exclude the current one), newest-first, when any exist. Reuse caseSummariesForAnimalProvider (FED-7.6) so it shows the full history incl. cases the user can't open — accessible ones tap into case detail, inaccessible render as non-tappable stubs (same treatment as the animal lifetime record). Hide the section entirely when the animal has no other cases. Keep it terse (number + status + admission date).
acceptance_criteria: 1) Overview tab shows a prior-cases list (current case excluded) only when others exist. 2) Accessible cases navigate to case detail; inaccessible show as stubs. 3) Reuses the FED-7.6 summary provider (no new backend). 4) Widget test for present/absent cases; analyze clean.
close_reason: Case Overview now shows an 'Andere Fälle'/'Other cases' card: animal's other cases (current excluded), newest-first, hidden when none. Reuses animalLifetimeProvider (FED-7.6) so inaccessible cases render as non-tappable stubs. Extracted shared CaseSummaryTile (also used by animal lifetime list) showing start–end span. Added ended_at to case_summaries view (migration 1700000018, latest disposition date) + CaseSummary.endedAt. Verified on live PB (50 checks); analyze clean, 150+14 tests green.

title: Header avatar: animal picture w/ fallback to latest case admission photo
description: Add a round avatar to the shared detail header. Source order: (1) an explicit animal picture if set, else (2) the most recent case's first intake photo for that animal, else (3) a placeholder (pets icon). Allow setting/replacing a dedicated animal picture that is SEPARATE from case intake photos. Needs backend: a new 'photo' file field on the animals collection (new migration; animals are org-wide readable so the file inherits that). Model: add Animal.photo + fileUrl access via animals repo. UI: round avatar in the header (tap to view/replace on the animal detail; read-only on the case header). Reuse the existing image_picker injection (imagePickerProvider) and createWithFiles/updateWithFiles + fileUrl(thumb) patterns. Fallback-to-latest-case-photo should reuse case_summaries/cases for the animal.
acceptance_criteria: 1) animals.photo file field via new migration; verified against a running PB stack. 2) Animal model exposes the photo; repo gives a thumb URL. 3) Header shows animal photo, else latest case admission photo, else placeholder, in a round avatar. 4) User can upload/replace the animal picture from the animal detail; it does not alter case intake photos. 5) Tests for the fallback selection logic + analyze clean.
close_reason: Header avatar (round): animal photo -> latest case intake photo -> placeholder, via pure pickAvatarSource + animalAvatarUrl provider + AnimalAvatar widget. Editable (gallery/camera/remove) from both animal & case headers. Backend animals.photo file field (migration 1700000017) verified on live PB (upload+readback rule test, 50 checks). Case header renders avatar from case.animal id so header never briefly centres. analyze clean, 148+14 tests green.

title: Shared case/animal detail header (adopt case-overview style)
description: The case detail header (_Header in case_detail_screen.dart) and the animal lifetime header (_Identity in animal_detail_screen.dart) are separate implementations that diverge and duplicate layout. Extract ONE shared header widget and use it in both. Adopt the case-overview style as the canonical look (name-first headline, species/subtitle line, status chip). The case header shows case status (CaseStatus); the animal header shows lifetime status (LifetimeStatus) — parameterise the chip/subtitle so one widget serves both. Prefer a widget in lib/ui or features/cases shared spot.
acceptance_criteria: 1) A single header widget renders both case detail and animal detail. 2) Visual style matches today's case-overview header. 3) Status chip is correct per screen (case vs lifetime status). 4) No regression in existing case/animal detail widget tests; analyze clean.
close_reason: Extracted DetailHeader (lib/ui/widgets/detail_header.dart): title + optional subtitle + optional status chip + optional leading slot (for ctw.7). Case _Header and animal _Identity both delegate to it; animal screen dropped its Card and centres the header block but keeps identical case-overview internals. 3 widget tests; analyze clean, 145 tests green.

title: Decide case status lifecycle — are in_treatment/rehab/ready_for_release needed?
description: The cases.status enum (migration 1700000004_cases.js) defines in_care | in_treatment | rehab | ready_for_release | disposed, but only two values are ever set, by hooks in pb_hooks/main.pb.js: in_care (default on case create) and disposed (on a terminal disposition). The three middle stages are unreachable — no app UI and no hook transitions a case into them. The app only reads status (list, detail chip, dashboard). REQUIREMENTS.md:164 calls status 'derived/maintained'; the dashboard (REQUIREMENTS.md:289 / FED-7.1) breaks down 'cases by status', so today it would always show in_care=N and the other active stages 0.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Decide whether the intermediate stages (in_treatment/rehab/ready_for_release) are needed at all, or whether in_care + disposed suffices. 2) If KEPT: add a transition mechanism (manual status picker on case detail and/or derive from clinical state, e.g. ready_for_release when is_releasable, in_treatment when active meds). 3) If DROPPED: new migration removing them from the enum, plus remove labels (cases_labels.dart + l10n) and the dashboard breakdown rows. 4) Revisit the FED-7.1 dashboard breakdown either way (note: empty rows were hidden as an interim fix).

title: FED-7.6 — Animal lifetime detail (all cases)
description: One animal's full lifetime record: identity (name/species/sex), markings (active + historic), lifetime status, and ALL its cases (current + historic) newest-first. Reuse casesForAnimal + markingsForAnimal. Inaccessible cases (held by another carer, not shared) render as a non-tappable stub showing case number + status + dates only (no clinical detail); accessible cases open into case detail. Reachable from the Animals registry and from a case (animal link).
close_reason: Animal lifetime detail: identity (name/species/sex + lifetime-status chip), all markings (active+historic), every case newest-first. Accessible cases tap into case detail; inaccessible ones render as non-tappable stubs (number/status/dates + no-access badge) sourced from a new org-wide case_summaries PB view (migration 1700000016) that projects only non-clinical columns. New CaseSummary model + repo + animalLifetime provider. Verified on live PB: 5 new rule tests (48 total) prove summary readable org-wide, no clinical leak, org isolation. Flutter mapper+widget tests green.

title: FED-7.5 — Animals registry (list + search)
description: Searchable list of the org's animals (persistent identities, org-wide readable). Row shows name, species, active marking code(s), lifetime status (in_care / at_large_released / in_aviary / deceased). Search by name or ring/chip code (reuse markings.activeByCode + animals.searchByName). Carers still see their animals here. Tap -> animal lifetime detail. Keep aviary residency in mind for later (Phase 6) but do not build aviary features now.
close_reason: Animals registry: searchable list of org animals (org-wide readable). Row shows name, species, active marking codes, lifetime status. Search matches name or active ring/chip code. Joins animals+active markings in one fetch; pure filterAnimals() unit-tested + widget tests. Rows tap to animal lifetime detail via new /animals/:id route (placeholder screen now, body filled by FED-7.6). Added lifetimeStatusLabel + l10n. Unblocks FED-7.6.

title: FED-7.4 — All-cases browser (filters + search)
description: Browse all cases the user can access (server rules scope it: carer = own + shared; coordinator/supervisor = all in org). DEFAULT VIEW = the user's own/active cases ('My cases'); an 'All' toggle/filter widens to everything they can access. Filters: status (incl. disposed/historic), active-vs-closed, species, date range; plus text search (case number / animal name). Tap-through to case detail. Access-scoped, not a new permission.
close_reason: All-cases browser: scope toggle (mine/all, server-scoped), activity (active/closed/all), species, admission date-range filters + text search (case no / animal name). Compact UI — search always visible, secondary filters in a badged filter bottom-sheet that updates live. Pure filterCases() over one client-side fetch (cases+animals); unit + widget tests. Replaced dead myCasesProvider; writes now refresh casesBrowserData+dashboardSummary. Dashboard->browser deep-link pre-filter filed as follow-up.

title: FED-7.0 — App navigation shell (adaptive)
description: Replace the single 'My cases' home with an adaptive top-level navigation: Material NavigationBar (bottom) on narrow screens and NavigationRail on wide/web. Destinations: Dashboard, Cases, Animals. Profile + supervisor Admin stay reachable from the app bar. Prerequisite for the rest of Phase 7.
close_reason: Adaptive nav shell: StatefulShellRoute (Dashboard/Cases/Animals) with NavigationBar<600w / NavigationRail>=600w (extended>=840). Profile+admin via shared AccountActions in each tab app bar. HomeScreen split into CasesScreen + Dashboard/Animals placeholders. Tests + analyze green.

title: Semantic medication frequency (reminder-ready)
description: Replace free-text medication frequency with a structured interval model so reminders can be built later (requirements: keep dates structured). Add frequency_kind (once|scheduled|as_needed) + interval_hours to medications; prescription form uses interval presets (q24/q12/q8/q6/q48/custom) + once/PRN; tile shows a derived label. Follow-up to FED-4.6.
close_reason: Medication frequency is now structured + reminder-ready: medications gains frequency_kind (once|scheduled|as_needed) + interval_hours (migration). Prescription form uses interval presets (once/q24/q12/q8/q6/q48/custom/PRN) mapping to (kind, hours); tile shows a derived label (e.g. 'Twice daily', 'Every 10 h'). Free-text frequency kept as an optional note. A reminder = last administration + interval_hours. Tests for default+chosen preset and tile label.

title: Tidy case detail into Overview/History tabs
description: Case detail was growing too long (header + intake + chart + timeline stacked). Split into a persistent name-first header over two tabs: Overview (intake summary + weight trend) and History (the unified chronology). User-chosen layout.
close_reason: Case detail is now a persistent name-first header over two tabs: Overview (weight trend + intake summary) and History (the unified CaseTimeline, title suppressed since the tab names it). Keeps the screen short as more record kinds land. Detail test updated to switch tabs.

title: Unified case chronology (merge timeline + journal)
description: Replace the two separate sections (intake-milestone timeline + journal list) on case detail with ONE time-ordered view. Intake milestones and journal entries interleave newest-first; future records (weights/meds/conditions/dispositions) plug in as additional event kinds. Refinement of FED-4.3/FED-4.7.
close_reason: Case detail now has one unified chronology: a shared TimelineItem (icon-dot rail + connecting line + date header) renders every event, so journal entries and intake milestones look consistent and all carry their date. Events interleave newest-first; future record kinds slot in. Replaces the separate JournalSection/_TimelineSection. Tests for ordering + empty state.

title: Journal entry edit & delete
description: Complete journal CRUD on top of FED-4.7: edit an entry's note/date, add new photos and remove existing attachments, and delete an entry (with confirm). Needs updateWithFiles() in the repository layer + the PocketBase partial file-update pattern (keep-list in body, new files appended).
close_reason: Journal CRUD complete: edit an entry's note/date with add/remove of attachments, and delete with confirm. Added updateWithFiles() (multipart, keep-list pattern) to the repo; generalized the entry sheet to create-or-edit; per-entry overflow menu for edit/delete. Tests for edit (drops removed attachment), delete, and updateWithFiles.

title: Intake photo upload (file-upload infra)
description: File-upload infra is DONE as of FED-4.7: PbRepository.createWithFiles() (multipart) + fileUrl() (incl. thumbs) landed and are tested. Remaining: wire intake_photos into the FED-4.1 intake form using the same infra (pick photos at intake, upload as multipart on case create). Small UI task now.
close_reason: Intake photos wired in using the FED-4.7 file-upload infra. Intake form stages photos (gallery/camera) via a reusable StagedPhotos widget; on create with photos it uses casesRepository.createWithFiles to upload them to the cases.intake_photos file field (else plain create). Case detail Overview shows intake-photo thumbnails (tap = full-size). casesRepositoryProvider now returns PbCasesRepository to expose createWithFiles/fileUrl. Tests for the upload path.

title: Configure PB SMTP + password-reset email template for invites
description: FED-3.2 invite flow is code-complete but needs deploy config to actually send mail: (1) SMTP settings in PocketBase; (2) point the users collection 'forgot password' email template action URL at the app's reset route, format: {APP_URL}/auth/confirm-reset?token={TOKEN} (the ConfirmResetScreen reads ?token=). Until then invites create the user but no email is delivered (locally use serve --dev to see the logged mail, or a mailpit/maildev container). SMTP creds are secrets — coordinate with user's no-.env preference (set in PB settings/volume, not committed).

title: Bootstrap first supervisor (doc + optional dev seed)
description: No users row is seeded (FED-1.1 seeds only the single organisations row), and registration is invite-only (FED-3.2). So the FIRST supervisor must be created out-of-band — chicken-and-egg for the invite flow and the M1 deploy. PocketBase superusers (admin UI) are NOT app-level Supervisors. Deliver: (1) a documented manual runbook step — create the first 'users' record via the PB admin UI with role=supervisor, is_active=true, org=<seeded org id>; (2) OPTIONAL dev-only guarded seed/script that upserts a local dev supervisor for testing (never run in prod). Currently only exists ad-hoc in local pb_data. Prereq for FED-3.2 (invite needs a supervisor) and required by FED-3.5 (deploy).

title: Generalize offline read cache to all collections
description: Extend FED-2.6 beyond recently-viewed cases: a generic RecordCache baked into PbRepository so every repository's getOne/list reads are cached and served offline on network failure, with writes updating/invalidating the cache. Replaces the cases-only decorator.
close_reason: Offline read cache generalized to ALL collections (not just cases). Pluggable RecordCache interface baked into PbRepository: every getOne/list caches raw records and is served from cache on network failure; writes refresh/evict. NoopRecordCache default keeps it opt-in. App provides bounded shared_preferences-backed PrefsRecordCache wired into all 14 repo providers. 13 cache/repo tests (7 data + 6 app).

title: App icon & splash (real artwork)
description: Replace very_good scaffold placeholder launcher icons and splash with the real Federfall artwork. Owner (Jan) will provide the source icon. Set up flutter_launcher_icons + flutter_native_splash (per-flavor if desired) and generate android/ios/web assets. Deferred from FED-0.3 at user request.

title: FED-4.10 — Markings + re-identification
description: Apply ring/marker; re-identification search at intake (link to existing animal + show prior history).
close_reason: Markings + re-identification. Apply/edit/remove/delete a ring/marker/chip (type, code, colour, scheme, applied date) as a timeline event on the animal; 'Mark removed' records removed_at/reason and deactivates. Re-identification at intake: search existing animals by active ring code or name, show matches with their active markings, and link the new case to the chosen animal (showing prior-case count) instead of creating a fresh one. Timeline add-menu gains marking. Uses existing markings collection/rules (no migration). Tests for apply, tile+mark-removed, and the intake link flow.

title: FED-5.1 — Case sharing UI
description: Share a case with a member (read/edit), revoke. Implements opt-in sharing.
close_reason: Case sharing UI: Share action on case detail (gated to active carer/supervisor) opens a sheet listing current shares (access + revoke) and granting read/edit shares to eligible org members (excludes self, active carer, already-shared). New caseShares provider + shareAccessLabel; reuses orgMembers/memberLabel. DropdownButtonFormField picker (DropdownMenu overlapped in the sheet). Widget tests; analyze clean, 163 green.

title: FED-8.1 — Finder-PII retention
description: Org-configurable retention window (default 2y) + purge/anonymise job (hook/cron).

title: FED-4.9 — Placements / handoff
description: Change active_carer; previous carer keeps read (via hook FED-1.12).
close_reason: Placements / handoff. New users repository (list active org members) for carer pickers. Placement sheet records a move/handoff (carer, where/area/enclosure, date, condition, comments) as a timeline event; choosing a carer other than the current active carer is a handoff — updates cases.active_carer (backend hook then auto-shares the previous carer read) and records from->to. Placement tile resolves carer names and shows handoff vs move; edit/delete. Timeline add-menu gains 'Hand off / move'. No migration (placements collection + rules + handoff hook already existed). Tests for handoff, plain move, tile.

title: FED-4.5 — Conditions/diagnoses
description: Code-list picker + free text + suspected/confirmed.
close_reason: Conditions/diagnoses: add/edit/delete a diagnosis as a chronology event. Condition field is a type-ahead over the seeded code list with free-text fallback (final text matched to a code-list label -> condition relation, else free_text). Certainty segmented control, onset + optional resolved dates, notes. Timeline tile resolves the label, shows certainty + a Meldepflichtig badge for notifiable diseases. Tests for code-list match, free text, validation, tile render, delete.

title: FED-7.2 — Statistics
description: Outcome breakdown, by species/condition, avg time-in-care.
close_reason: Statistics screen (coord/supervisor, via dashboard app-bar action + /statistics route): KPI cards (total/open cases, avg time in care) + breakdowns by outcome (terminal disposition per case), species (intakes), condition. Org-wide for those roles via existing repos, no backend. Pure computeStatistics() + provider; outcomes keyed by DispositionType, species/conditions ranked. canViewReports role helper. Unit + widget tests; analyze clean, 158+14 green. Unblocks FED-7.3 (CSV) + 7.7 (PDF).

title: FED-4.6 — Medications
description: Drug/dose/route/frequency/start-end/controlled.
close_reason: Medications as plan + dose log. New medication_administrations backend collection (migration + child access rules + rule test). Models/repo/providers for both. Prescription sheet (drug/dose/route/frequency/dates/controlled/instructions/prescriber) and dose sheet (prefill+link from a plan, or ad-hoc; administered_by=carer). Both are timeline events; prescription tile has Log dose / edit / delete + controlled badge. Timeline add-menu gains prescription + dose. NOTE: frequency is free-text; semantic/structured frequency for reminders tracked separately.

title: FED-8.6 — Ops hardening
description: Backup restore drill, monitoring/uptime, self-hosted Nominatim/tiles (or documented public-OSM usage policy).

title: FED-8.2 — GDPR export/delete
description: Data export + delete for a person on request.

title: FED-7.1 — Dashboard
description: Dashboard landing (access-scoped): KPI cards + lists — active cases, intakes this year, cases by status, quarantine ending soon. Scope follows access rules: a carer sees their own figures; coordinator/supervisor see org-wide. Each card taps through to the all-cases browser (FED-7.4) pre-filtered. Lives as the Dashboard destination in the nav shell (FED-7.0).
close_reason: Dashboard: KPI cards (active cases, intakes this year), active-case status breakdown, and quarantine-ending-soon list (overdue+next 7d, taps to case detail). Scope follows access rules via repo.list() (carer own+shared, coord/sup org-wide). Pure buildDashboardSummary + provider; unit + widget tests. Card tap-through to pre-filtered all-cases browser awaits FED-7.4.

title: FED-4.7 — Journal + photos
description: Dated journal entries with photo attachments.
close_reason: Journal: dated free-text entries with photo attachments. Added multipart file-upload to the repository layer (createWithFiles + fileUrl with thumbnails); JournalSection on case detail (newest-first, photo thumbnails opening full-size), and a new-entry bottom sheet with gallery/camera picking via image_picker. iOS photo/camera usage descriptions added. Widget + data-layer tests.

title: FED-5.2 — Visibility verification
description: End-to-end automated verification: private default, opt-in share, coordinator all-read, supervisor all.
close_reason: Visibility fully verified in test_rules.py: matrix (private default, read/edit shares, coordinator all-read, supervisor all, org isolation) already covered; added carer-driven opt-in share lifecycle (outsider cannot grant; owner grants read share -> recipient views not edits; revoke removes access). 57 backend checks pass on a live PB stack.

title: FED-4.4 — Weights + trend chart
description: Add weights + weight trend chart.
close_reason: Weights: add/edit/delete a measurement (grams, accepts comma decimals; date; optional note) as a case-chronology event, plus a fl_chart weight-trend line chart on case detail (shown at >=2 points). Each measurement is a TimelineItem alongside journal/milestones; the timeline header add-menu now offers note vs weight. Tests for sheet save/validation, tile delete, timeline placement, trend chart.

title: FED-4.12 — Disposition: placed in aviary (M2)
description: Place in named aviary; animal becomes resident. Milestone M2 capstone.
close_reason: Disposition 'placed in aviary' added to the sheet (required active-aviary picker). Product decision: placement is terminal — hook sets case status=disposed + animal lifetime_status=in_aviary + current_aviary; resident falling ill = new case (no permanent_care status; see federfall-aviary-placement-closes-case memory). New activeAviaries provider. Widget test + rule test (57 backend checks). analyze clean, 168 green. M2 capstone.

title: FED-6.1 — Aviary CRUD
description: Aviary CRUD (name, keeper, location, capacity).
close_reason: Aviary CRUD: new Aviaries nav tab lists org aviaries (keeper/location/capacity/inactive badge); coord/supervisor create+edit via form sheet (name/keeper/location/capacity/active/notes), all view. New aviariesProvider + canManageAviaries; reuses orgMembers. Widget tests; analyze clean, 167 green. Unblocks FED-6.2 + FED-4.12.

title: FED-6.2 — Resident / occupancy view
description: List residents (cases placed in an aviary) / occupancy.
close_reason: Aviary detail/occupancy: /aviaries/:id shows identity + occupancy chip (residents/capacity) + resident animals (current_aviary == aviary), tap-through to animal lifetime detail; coord/supervisor edit action. aviaryById/aviaryResidents providers; list row now opens detail. Widget tests; analyze clean, 171 green.

title: FED-4.2 — Find-location (OSM + Nominatim)
description: flutter_map with OSM tiles + Nominatim geocoding (address ⇄ pin). No Big Tech.
close_reason: Find-location: flutter_map (OSM, tile URL configurable via dart-define) + geocoding via a backend proxy (pb_hooks/geocode.pb.js, auth-only /api/federfall/geocode + /reverse) forwarding to a configurable Nominatim (FEDERFALL_NOMINATIM_URL, optional FEDERFALL_GEOCODER_KEY, FEDERFALL_USER_AGENT). GeocodingRepository decouples the geocoder. Picker (search=forward, tap=reverse) wired into intake (stores find_geo/find_location/city/region); read-only mini-map on detail. VERIFIED end-to-end on live PB against public OSM (works with a plain UA; note Nominatim blocks placeholder domains like example.org — default UA carries no address). Geocoding-repo tests pass.

title: FED-7.3 — CSV export (M3)
description: CSV export for annual report. Milestone M3.
close_reason: CSV export on Statistics screen: per-case rows (number/species/name/dates/status/outcome/days-in-care/city/region/reasons), org-wide for coord/supervisor. csv package (CsvEncoder + UTF-8 BOM), delivered via share_plus (mobile share / web download). ISO dates, localized labels. Pure buildCaseReportRows + encodeCaseReportCsv unit-tested. Loads inline from keep-alive repos (autoDispose provider disposed mid-await). Verified working by user. analyze clean, 161 tests green. M3 reached. Unblocks FED-7.7 (PDF).

title: FED-1.10 — Seed code lists (German)
description: Seed conditions (Trichomonadose, Paramyxovirose, Salmonellose, Fadenfuß, Spreizbein, Fraktur, MBD…) + reasons-for-admission list.
notes: conditions code list uses a SINGLE 'label' field (user's own language), NOT label_de/label_en — seed accordingly. Decision made during FED-1.6.
close_reason: Seeded 22 German feral-pigeon conditions into org00000default (single 'label' field per FED-1.6; PMV + Ornithose/Chlamydiose flagged is_notifiable). reasons-for-admission already an inline cases enum (FED-1.3), not seeded. Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: Phase 8 — Hardening, GDPR & release (M4=MVP)
description: Retention/export, MFA, tests, release builds, ops. Milestone M4. §Phase 8.

title: FED-3.3 — Role-gated nav & profile
description: Role-based navigation gating + minimal profile screen.
close_reason: Role-gated nav & profile: canManageTeam(role) capability helper (UI gate; server API rules remain the boundary), supervisor-only Verwaltung/admin entry in home app bar + screen-level role guard (stub for FED-3.2), profile screen (name/email/localized role) with sign-out relocated from home. UserRole labels localized via arb. Tests: home role-gating (carer hides admin / supervisor shows), profile (role+signout), admin gate (supervisor vs carer). 69 app tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: FED-2.7 — Error handling & logging
description: App-wide error handling, Result/failure types, logging.
close_reason: App-wide error handling & logging: AppLogger facade (level-gated, dart:developer) + provider; LoggingProviderObserver logs all provider failures; bootstrap wires FlutterError.onError + PlatformDispatcher.onError + observer through one logger. Result<T> (Ok/Err + guard/fold) for imperative outcomes. Localized errorMessage() maps RepositoryErrorKind→l10n. 7 tests.

title: FED-2.6 — Light offline read cache
description: Cache recently-viewed cases behind the repository (reads work offline; edits require connection).
close_reason: Offline read cache generalized to ALL collections (not just cases). Pluggable RecordCache interface baked into PbRepository: every getOne/list caches raw records and is served from cache on network failure; writes refresh/evict. NoopRecordCache default keeps it opt-in. App provides bounded shared_preferences-backed PrefsRecordCache wired into all 14 repo providers. 13 cache/repo tests (7 data + 6 app).

title: Phase 6 — Aviaries
description: Aviary CRUD + resident/occupancy view. §Phase 6.
close_reason: Phase 6 — Aviaries complete: FED-6.1 aviary CRUD + FED-6.2 residents/occupancy + FED-4.12 disposition->placed in aviary (closes case, animal becomes resident).

title: Phase 7 — Dashboard & reporting (M3)
description: Dashboard, statistics, CSV export. Milestone M3. §Phase 7.

title: Phase 5 — Sharing & visibility
description: Opt-in case sharing + visibility verification. §Phase 5.
close_reason: Phase 5 — Sharing & visibility complete: FED-5.1 case sharing UI + FED-5.2 visibility verification (57 backend checks).

title: Wire dashboard cards to pre-filtered all-cases browser
description: FED-7.1 dashboard KPI/status cards should tap through to the FED-7.4 all-cases browser pre-filtered (e.g. Active cases -> browser scoped to active; a status row -> that status; intakes-this-year -> date range = current year). The browser (FED-7.4) now exists but holds its filter state locally, so this needs deep-link plumbing: encode the filter in the /cases route (query params), have CasesScreen seed its CaseQuery from them, and point the dashboard cards at those links. Quarantine list already links to case detail.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard active-cases / status / intakes cards navigate to the Cases tab with the corresponding filter applied; deep-linkable via URL on web.

title: FED-7.7 — PDF annual report export
description: Formatted PDF annual report (intakes per period, outcome rates, species/condition breakdown) for printing/submission. Follow-up to FED-7.3 (CSV) and FED-7.2 (statistics); requirements list PDF as a reporting goal. Deferred from M3.

title: Refine find-location map picker UI
description: Visual refinement of the FED-4.2 location picker (LocationPickerScreen): the floating search bar, results dropdown, pin marker and bottom address/confirm bar are functional but plain. Polish layout/spacing/elevation, current-location button, clearer selected-address card, loading/empty states, and overall map-screen aesthetics. Follow-up to FED-4.2 (find-location).

title: FED-4.8 — Optional structured exam
description: Expandable structured exam (BCS, dehydration, body-system findings).

title: FED-8.3 — Optional MFA
description: Optional MFA (encourage for supervisors).
